forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '9180'
+project: ai-panel
+title: Fix stale crate paths in UI node/browser tests after apps/ move
+---
+## What
+Three pre-existing UI tests fail because they resolve fixture paths against `apps/swissarmyhammer-*` but those crates moved to `crates/swissarmyhammer-*` in commit `a70af2f95` (`refactor(workspace): move app crates into ./apps`). The fixture files exist, just at the new location.
+
+Failing files (in `apps/kanban-app/ui`):
+- `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` ‚Äî `CORPUS_PATH` resolves to `apps/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`; actual file is `crates/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`.
+- `src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî `commands.loadFieldDefinitions()` scans `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`; actual dir is `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`.
+
+This was discovered while implementing task `01KRRN386C7THGV5T6RCA59H4F` (Vendor AI Elements). It is unrelated to that work ‚Äî the failures reproduce on the unmodified HEAD baseline.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] The three test files resolve fixture paths to the `crates/` location (or a shared path helper).
+- [ ] `npm test` in `apps/kanban-app/ui` is fully green with zero failures.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `npm test` (`tsc --noEmit && vitest run`) in `apps/kanban-app/ui` passes with 0 failed.
\ No newline at end of file

-- `src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî `commands.loadFieldDefinitions()` scans `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`; actual dir is `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`.

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -7,17 +7,28 @@
 title: Fix stale crate paths in UI node/browser tests after apps/ move
 ---
 ## What
-Three pre-existing UI tests fail because they resolve fixture paths against `apps/swissarmyhammer-*` but those crates moved to `crates/swissarmyhammer-*` in commit `a70af2f95` (`refactor(workspace): move app crates into ./apps`). The fixture files exist, just at the new location.
+Three pre-existing UI test suites fail because they resolve fixture/binary paths against `apps/...` but the targets moved when `swissarmyhammer-*` crates were relocated to `crates/swissarmyhammer-*` in commit `a70af2f95` (`refactor(workspace): move app crates into ./apps`). The fixture files and binary all exist, just at a different relative depth.

-Failing files (in `apps/kanban-app/ui`):
-- `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` ‚Äî `CORPUS_PATH` resolves to `apps/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`; actual file is `crates/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`.
-- `src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî `commands.loadFieldDefinitions()` scans `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`; actual dir is `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`.
+Root cause is two files, both untouched since `a70af2f95` (the move mechanically rewrote them but did not fix the `../` depth):

-This was discovered while implementing task `01KRRN386C7THGV5T6RCA59H4F` (Vendor AI Elements). It is unrelated to that work ‚Äî the failures reproduce on the unmodified HEAD baseline.
+1. `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` (line 22) ‚Äî `CORPUS_PATH = resolve(__dirname, "../../../..", "swissarmyhammer-common", "tests", "slug_parity_corpus.txt")`. From `src/lib`, four `..` lands at `apps/kanban-app` ‚Üí resolves to `apps/kanban-app/swissarmyhammer-common/...`. Actual file: `crates/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`.
+
+2. `src/test/integration-commands.ts` ‚Äî three stale paths, all `resolve(__dirname, "../../../../...")` from `src/test` which lands at `apps/`:
+   - line 25 `KANBAN_BIN` ‚Üí `apps/target/debug/kanban`; actual binary: repo-root `target/debug/kanban`.
+   - line 30 `DEFINITIONS_DIR` ‚Üí `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`; actual: `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`.
+   - line 34 `BUILTIN_ENTITIES_DIR` ‚Üí `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities`; actual: `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities`.

+Failing test suites (in `apps/kanban-app/ui`), confirmed reproducing on unmodified HEAD:
+- `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` ‚Äî 2 failing tests (corpus file load + idempotency), from stale `CORPUS_PATH`.
+- `src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî suite fails in `beforeAll` via `commands.loadFieldDefinitions()`, from stale `DEFINITIONS_DIR` in `integration-commands.ts`.
+- `src/components/board-integration.browser.test.tsx` ‚Äî suite fails in `beforeAll` via `commands.createTestBoard()`, from stale `KANBAN_BIN` in `integration-commands.ts` (`apps/target/debug/kanban: No such file or directory`).
+
+Discovered while implementing task `01KRRN386C7THGV5T6RCA59H4F` (Vendor AI Elements) and confirmed again during verification. Unrelated to that work ‚Äî `git diff HEAD` for `apps/kanban-app/ui` touches only `package.json` plus new untracked component files; none of the failing test files or `integration-commands.ts` were modified.
+
 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] The three test files resolve fixture paths to the `crates/` location (or a shared path helper).
+- [ ] `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` resolves `CORPUS_PATH` to the `crates/swissarmyhammer-common` location.
+- [ ] `src/test/integration-commands.ts` resolves `KANBAN_BIN`, `DEFINITIONS_DIR`, and `BUILTIN_ENTITIES_DIR` to their correct post-move locations (`target/` at repo root, `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/*`).
 - [ ] `npm test` in `apps/kanban-app/ui` is fully green with zero failures.

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `npm test` (`tsc --noEmit && vitest run`) in `apps/kanban-app/ui` passes with 0 failed.
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `npm test` (`tsc --noEmit && vitest run`) in `apps/kanban-app/ui` passes with 0 failed (currently 3 suites / 2+ tests failing).
\ No newline at end of file
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -7,28 +7,17 @@
 title: Fix stale crate paths in UI node/browser tests after apps/ move
 ---
 ## What
-Three pre-existing UI test suites fail because they resolve fixture/binary paths against `apps/...` but the targets moved when `swissarmyhammer-*` crates were relocated to `crates/swissarmyhammer-*` in commit `a70af2f95` (`refactor(workspace): move app crates into ./apps`). The fixture files and binary all exist, just at a different relative depth.
-
-Root cause is two files, both untouched since `a70af2f95` (the move mechanically rewrote them but did not fix the `../` depth):
-
-1. `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` (line 22) ‚Äî `CORPUS_PATH = resolve(__dirname, "../../../..", "swissarmyhammer-common", "tests", "slug_parity_corpus.txt")`. From `src/lib`, four `..` lands at `apps/kanban-app` ‚Üí resolves to `apps/kanban-app/swissarmyhammer-common/...`. Actual file: `crates/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`.
-
-2. `src/test/integration-commands.ts` ‚Äî three stale paths, all `resolve(__dirname, "../../../../...")` from `src/test` which lands at `apps/`:
-   - line 25 `KANBAN_BIN` ‚Üí `apps/target/debug/kanban`; actual binary: repo-root `target/debug/kanban`.
-   - line 30 `DEFINITIONS_DIR` ‚Üí `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`; actual: `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`.
-   - line 34 `BUILTIN_ENTITIES_DIR` ‚Üí `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities`; actual: `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities`.
+Three pre-existing UI tests fail because they resolve fixture paths against `apps/swissarmyhammer-*` but those crates moved to `crates/swissarmyhammer-*` in commit `a70af2f95` (`refactor(workspace): move app crates into ./apps`). The fixture files exist, just at the new location.

-Failing test suites (in `apps/kanban-app/ui`), confirmed reproducing on unmodified HEAD:
-- `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` ‚Äî 2 failing tests (corpus file load + idempotency), from stale `CORPUS_PATH`.
-- `src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî suite fails in `beforeAll` via `commands.loadFieldDefinitions()`, from stale `DEFINITIONS_DIR` in `integration-commands.ts`.
-- `src/components/board-integration.browser.test.tsx` ‚Äî suite fails in `beforeAll` via `commands.createTestBoard()`, from stale `KANBAN_BIN` in `integration-commands.ts` (`apps/target/debug/kanban: No such file or directory`).
+Failing files (in `apps/kanban-app/ui`):
+- `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` ‚Äî `CORPUS_PATH` resolves to `apps/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`; actual file is `crates/swissarmyhammer-common/tests/slug_parity_corpus.txt`.
+- `src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî `commands.loadFieldDefinitions()` scans `apps/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`; actual dir is `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/definitions`.

-Discovered while implementing task `01KRRN386C7THGV5T6RCA59H4F` (Vendor AI Elements) and confirmed again during verification. Unrelated to that work ‚Äî `git diff HEAD` for `apps/kanban-app/ui` touches only `package.json` plus new untracked component files; none of the failing test files or `integration-commands.ts` were modified.
+This was discovered while implementing task `01KRRN386C7THGV5T6RCA59H4F` (Vendor AI Elements). It is unrelated to that work ‚Äî the failures reproduce on the unmodified HEAD baseline.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `src/lib/slugify.parity.node.test.ts` resolves `CORPUS_PATH` to the `crates/swissarmyhammer-common` location.
-- [ ] `src/test/integration-commands.ts` resolves `KANBAN_BIN`, `DEFINITIONS_DIR`, and `BUILTIN_ENTITIES_DIR` to their correct post-move locations (`target/` at repo root, `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/*`).
+- [ ] The three test files resolve fixture paths to the `crates/` location (or a shared path helper).
 - [ ] `npm test` in `apps/kanban-app/ui` is fully green with zero failures.

 ## Tests
